meta.title: Test World
meta.description: A small test world with a forest clearing, deep woods, hillside, and a locked cabin.

properties.name: Forest Clearing
properties.description: You stand in a sunlit clearing surrounded by tall oaks. A weathered stone bench sits beneath the largest tree. Paths lead in several directions.

properties.name: Deep Woods
properties.description: The canopy above is thick, filtering the light into green shafts. The forest floor is soft with fallen leaves. An old wooden chest sits half-hidden among the roots.

properties.name: Rocky Hillside
properties.description: Loose stones shift under your feet as you climb a gentle slope. From here you can see the forest stretching out to the west. A small stone cabin stands at the top of the hill.

properties.name: Stone Cabin
properties.description: The interior of the cabin is sparse but cozy. A fireplace dominates one wall, and a rough wooden table sits in the center. Dusty shelves line the walls.

properties.name: Lantern
properties.description: A brass lantern, slightly tarnished but still functional.

properties.name: Wooden Chest
properties.description: A sturdy wooden chest with iron bands. It looks old but well-made.

properties.name: Iron Key
properties.description: A heavy iron key with an ornate handle.

properties.name: Silver Coin
properties.description: A tarnished silver coin with an unfamiliar crest.

properties.name: Coil of Rope
properties.description: A sturdy hemp rope, about thirty feet long.

properties.name: Glass Flask
properties.description: A small glass flask with a cork stopper. It contains a shimmering blue liquid.

properties.name: Blue Potion
properties.description: A shimmering blue liquid that seems to glow faintly.

properties.name: Smooth Stone
properties.description: A smooth, palm-sized stone. It feels oddly warm to the touch.

properties.name: Hand Mirror
properties.description: A tarnished hand mirror with an ornate silver frame. Your reflection looks back at you, slightly distorted.

properties.name: Beeswax Candle
properties.description: ${self.lit ? 'A beeswax candle burns with a steady golden flame.' : 'A thick beeswax candle, unlit. It smells faintly of honey.'}

properties.name: Tinderbox
properties.description: A small brass tinderbox with flint and steel inside.
